_doc: Home Assistant entity customization -- friendly names and icons for all Havn garden sensors.

entities.friendly_name: Bed D (Terrace Herb Bed) - Soil Moisture
Bed D (Terrace Herb Bed) - Soil Temperature
Bed E (Terrace Flower Bed) - Soil Moisture
Bed E (Terrace Flower Bed) - Soil Temperature

yaml_output:
# customize.yaml
homeassistant:
  customize:
    sensor.havn_bed_a_moisture:
      friendly_name: "Bed A (His Bed) - Soil Moisture"
      icon: mdi:water-percent
    sensor.havn_bed_a_temperature:
      friendly_name: "Bed A (His Bed) - Soil Temperature"
      icon: mdi:thermometer
    sensor.havn_bed_b_moisture:
      friendly_name: "Bed B (Raspberry Bed) - Soil Moisture"
      icon: mdi:water-percent
    sensor.havn_bed_b_temperature:
      friendly_name: "Bed B (Raspberry Bed) - Soil Temperature"
      icon: mdi:thermometer
    sensor.havn_bed_c_moisture:
      friendly_name: "Bed C (Shared Bed) - Soil Moisture"
      icon: mdi:water-percent
    sensor.havn_bed_c_temperature:
      friendly_name: "Bed C (Shared Bed) - Soil Temperature"
      icon: mdi:thermometer
    sensor.havn_bed_d_moisture:
      friendly_name: "Bed D (Terrace Herb Bed) - Soil Moisture"
      icon: mdi:water-percent
    sensor.havn_bed_d_temperature:
      friendly_name: "Bed D (Terrace Herb Bed) - Soil Temperature"
      icon: mdi:thermometer
    sensor.havn_bed_e_moisture:
      friendly_name: "Bed E (Terrace Flower Bed) - Soil Moisture"
      icon: mdi:water-percent
    sensor.havn_bed_e_temperature:
      friendly_name: "Bed E (Terrace Flower Bed) - Soil Temperature"
      icon: mdi:thermometer
